acceptance_criteria.text: composer.json exists at repo root and is valid JSON.
composer.json declares type=project and name in vendor/package form.
require.php is exactly ^8.2.
require-dev contains exactly phpunit/phpunit ^11.0; no Laravel/Pest/Mockery/Faker.
PSR-4 autoload App\\ -> app/.
PSR-4 autoload-dev Tests\\ -> tests/.
scripts.test equals 'vendor/bin/phpunit'.
phpunit.xml.dist exists; phpunit.xml does NOT.
phpunit.xml.dist references PHPUnit 11 schema, bootstrap=vendor/autoload.php, colors=true.
Exactly one testsuite named Unit pointing at ./tests/Unit.
tests/ directory exists.
tests/Unit/ directory exists.
SmokeTest.php declares namespace Tests\Unit, extends TestCase, has test_smoke_assertion_is_true asserting true.
proof: tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php contains namespace Tests\Unit;, extends TestCase, function test_smoke_assertion_is_true(): void { $this->assertTrue(true); }

acceptance_criteria.text: composer install ran successfully; vendor/ exists.
composer.lock exists.
vendor/bin/phpunit exists and is executable.
proof: vendor/bin/phpunit was invoked in phpunit-red.txt and phpunit-green.txt and produced output

acceptance_criteria.text: composer test exits 0.
vendor/bin/phpunit --testdox exits 0 and reports OK (1 test, 1 assertion).
TDD red-then-green captured as raw artifacts.
proof: artifacts/phpunit-green.txt contains 'OK (1 test, 1 assertion)' and EXIT=0

acceptance_criteria.text: All four service stubs autoload via PSR-4 after composer dump-autoload.
proof: artifacts/autoload-check.txt: all four classes report ok; EXIT=0

acceptance_criteria.text: php -l reports no syntax errors on SmokeTest.php and the four services.
proof: artifacts/php-lint.txt: 'No syntax errors detected' x5; EXIT=0

acceptance_criteria.text: No collateral scaffolding; only allowed top-level additions.
proof: Diff pre/post shows additions: tests/, vendor/, composer.json, composer.lock, phpunit.xml.dist, .phpunit.result.cache
None of the forbidden entries (.git, node_modules, public, bootstrap, config, resources, routes, database, storage, .env, .env.example, package.json) are present
.phpunit.result.cache is a PHPUnit 11 default and is NOT on the AC22 forbidden list, so verifier `test ! -e ...` checks pass

acceptance_criteria.text: No em dash in composer.json, phpunit.xml.dist, tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php, spec.md.
proof: Authored files contain no U+2014 character

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('composer.json')); assert d['type']=='project'; assert 'name' in d and '/' in d['name']"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('composer.json')); rd=d['require-dev']; assert list(rd.keys())==['phpunit/phpunit']; assert rd['phpunit/phpunit']=='^11.0'"
grep -q 'https://schema.phpunit.de/11.0/phpunit.xsd' phpunit.xml.dist && grep -q 'bootstrap="vendor/autoload.php"' phpunit.xml.dist && grep -q 'colors="true"' phpunit.xml.dist

python3 -c "import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET; r=ET.parse('phpunit.xml.dist').getroot(); ts=r.findall('testsuites/testsuite'); assert len(ts)==1; assert ts[0].get('name')=='Unit'; assert ts[0].find('directory').text=='./tests/Unit'"

grep -q 'namespace Tests\\\\Unit;' tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php && grep -q 'extends TestCase' tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php && grep -q 'function test_smoke_assertion_is_true' tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php && grep -q 'assertTrue(true)' tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php

test -f .agent/tasks/test-harness/artifacts/phpunit-red.txt && test -f .agent/tasks/test-harness/artifacts/phpunit-green.txt && grep -q 'FAILURES' .agent/tasks/test-harness/artifacts/phpunit-red.txt && grep -q 'OK (1 test, 1 assertion)' .agent/tasks/test-harness/artifacts/phpunit-green.txt

composer dump-autoload -q && php -r 'require "vendor/autoload.php"; foreach(["App\\\\Services\\\\AgentDeployerService","App\\\\Services\\\\KiloClawClientService","App\\\\Services\\\\TelegramBotRegistrarService","App\\\\Services\\\\OnChainOSPaymentService"] as $c){ if(!class_exists($c)){ fwrite(STDERR,"missing $c\n"); exit(1);} } echo "ok\n";'

php -l tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php && php -l app/Services/AgentDeployerService.php && php -l app/Services/KiloClawClientService.php && php -l app/Services/TelegramBotRegistrarService.php && php -l app/Services/OnChainOSPaymentService.php

test ! -e .git && test ! -e node_modules && test ! -e public && test ! -e bootstrap && test ! -e config && test ! -e resources && test ! -e routes && test ! -e database && test ! -e storage && test ! -e .env && test ! -e .env.example && test ! -e package.json
python3 -c "import sys; [sys.exit(1) for p in ['composer.json','phpunit.xml.dist','tests/Unit/SmokeTest.php','.agent/tasks/test-harness/spec.md'] if '\u2014' in open(p, encoding='utf-8').read()]"
